import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"

import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Derive Token"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/v2/admin/apiKeys:derive"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Mints a short-lived JWT or Macaroon token from an API key. Works with both issued and imported keys. The derived token inherits
the permissions of the parent API key.

```http
POST /v2/admin/apiKeys:derive
{
  "credential": "eyJhbGciOiJFZERTQSI...",
  "ttl": "1h"
}
```

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails parameters={undefined}></ParamsDetails>
